# Liftngo

> Liftngo is a logistics platform for goods transport: hyperlocal delivery around Khatu Shyam Ji (Rajasthan) and B2B corridors in Noida and Delhi NCR. Users book two-wheeler, three-wheeler, and four-wheeler cargo with upfront pricing, focused on parcels and business shipments, not passenger ride-hailing.

Liftngo also offers Khatu-area services: verified hotel stays, marketplace shops (prasad and temple-town goods), food partner menus with delivery booking, and corridor rides (e.g. Khatu-Salasar-Ringus). Use the links below for the clearest pages for assistants and search tools.

## Core product

- [Home - logistics overview](https://www.goliftngo.com/): Primary landing: goods delivery, fleet options, and service areas.
- [Book delivery](https://www.goliftngo.com/book-delivery): Start a goods booking flow for Delhi NCR and supported zones.
- [Services](https://www.goliftngo.com/services): Vehicle modes (walk assist, 2W, 3W, 4W cargo) and how they map to shipments.
- [FAQ](https://www.goliftngo.com/faq): Common questions about coverage, pricing model, and how Liftngo differs from generic ride apps.
- [About Liftngo](https://www.goliftngo.com/about): Company positioning, operating geography, and B2B emphasis.

## Khatu Shyam Ji & temple-town logistics

- [Khatu Shyam logistics hub](https://www.goliftngo.com/khatu-shyam-logistics): Hyperlocal goods transport and context for businesses near the mandir.
- [Khatu travel & corridor rides](https://www.goliftngo.com/khatu/travel): Route estimates and booking entry for Khatu, Salasar, and Ringus-area trips.
- [Khatu hotels (verified stays)](https://www.goliftngo.com/khatu/hotels): Filtered list of Liftngo-verified properties near the temple.
- [Khatu marketplace](https://www.goliftngo.com/khatu/marketplace): Prasad and religious retail shops with cart checkout and rider delivery.
- [Food delivery - restaurant partners](https://www.goliftngo.com/find-restaurant): Partner kitchens and menus in the Khatu Shyam Ji area.
- [Khatu visitor guide](https://www.goliftngo.com/khatu/guide): Travel, darshan timing context, and practical tips (non-booking editorial).

## City & B2B landing pages

- [Goods transport - Khatu](https://www.goliftngo.com/khatu-goods-transport): SEO landing for mini truck and last-mile framing in Khatu.
- [Mini truck — Delhi](https://www.goliftngo.com/delhi-mini-truck-booking): Delhi-focused goods booking positioning.
- [Last-mile — Noida](https://www.goliftngo.com/noida-last-mile-delivery): Noida B2B and last-mile emphasis.
- [Noida B2B logistics](https://www.goliftngo.com/noida-b2b-logistics): Corporate and recurring shipment angle for NCR.

## Policies & trust

- [Privacy policy](https://www.goliftngo.com/privacy): Data use and user rights.
- [Terms of service](https://www.goliftngo.com/terms): Legal terms for using Liftngo services.
- [Robots directives](https://www.goliftngo.com/robots.txt): Crawler rules for the site.
- [Sitemap](https://www.goliftngo.com/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of public URLs.

## Optional

- [Blog - logistics articles](https://www.goliftngo.com/blog): Long-form NCR and Khatu logistics content.
- [B2B transport](https://www.goliftngo.com/b2b-transport): Broader B2B positioning page.
- [Careers](https://www.goliftngo.com/careers): Hiring and driver-partner information.
- [Promotions](https://www.goliftngo.com/promotions): Active offers when published.
